_comment: Sourced 19-product line. Prices = sheet retail (premium, adjustable). Images = 34 vetted clean supplier shots staged in /public/products. Products with <4 images import as Draft.

products.title: Autivora Solar — Spinning Car Diffuser
products.body_html:
A solar-spun rotor keeps fragrance moving the moment sunlight hits the dash — no batteries, no cords.

  • Solar-powered spinning rotor
  • Clips to any air vent
  • Waterless — a few drops of oil, no spills
  • Refillable scent core
products.seo_description: A solar-spun rotor keeps fragrance moving the moment sunlight hits the dash — no batteries, no cords.

products.title: Autivora Astronaut — Car Vent Diffuser
products.body_html:
A collectible astronaut that turns your vents into a signature scent — the design piece that started the line.

  • Sculpted astronaut figure
  • Clips to any air vent
  • Waterless refillable scent core
  • Available in multiple colorways
products.seo_description: A collectible astronaut that turns your vents into a signature scent — the design piece that started the line.

products.title: Autivora Aviator — Bear Propeller Diffuser
products.body_html:
A pilot bear with a spinning propeller that catches the airflow and carries scent through the cabin.

  • Spinning propeller on airflow
  • Soft-touch silicone vent clip
  • Magnetic top for easy refills
  • Waterless scent tablets
products.seo_description: A pilot bear with a spinning propeller that catches the airflow and carries scent through the cabin.

products.title: Autivora Disc — Magnetic Vent Diffuser
products.body_html:
A machined metal disc that snaps shut with a magnet — a quiet, premium piece for the modern cabin.

  • Magnetic two-piece metal body
  • Clips to any air vent
  • Refillable felt scent pad
  • Gift-boxed
products.seo_description: A machined metal disc that snaps shut with a magnet — a quiet, premium piece for the modern cabin.

products.title: Autivora Cabin — Rechargeable Car Diffuser
products.body_html:
A rechargeable cabin diffuser with adjustable output — set it and let the scent ride with you.

  • USB-C rechargeable
  • Adjustable intensity
  • Waterless nebulizing core
  • Gift-boxed
products.seo_description: A rechargeable cabin diffuser with adjustable output — set it and let the scent ride with you.

products.title: Autivora Pulse — Smart Spray Car Diffuser
products.body_html:
An automatic micro-spray that pulses fragrance on a timer, with an ambient RGB glow for night drives.

  • Timed automatic micro-spray
  • Three intensity modes
  • Ambient RGB light ring
  • USB-C rechargeable
products.seo_description: An automatic micro-spray that pulses fragrance on a timer, with an ambient RGB glow for night drives.

products.title: Autivora Ember — Volcano Flame Diffuser
products.body_html:
A glowing volcano that breathes a cold mist plume — equal parts diffuser and tabletop ambience.

  • Realistic flame-glow LED
  • Ultrasonic cold mist — no heat
  • Auto shut-off when dry
  • USB powered
products.seo_description: A glowing volcano that breathes a cold mist plume — equal parts diffuser and tabletop ambience.

products.title: Autivora Nimbus — Jellyfish Mist Diffuser
products.body_html:
Drifting jellyfish rise through a backlit mist — a calming light show with a remote to set the mood.

  • Dynamic jellyfish + flame effect
  • Remote control
  • Ultrasonic cold mist
  • Auto shut-off when dry
products.seo_description: Drifting jellyfish rise through a backlit mist — a calming light show with a remote to set the mood.

products.title: Autivora Hearth — Fireplace Flame Diffuser
products.body_html:
A miniature hearth with a startlingly real flame and a soft scented mist — warmth without the heat.

  • Realistic fireplace flame effect
  • Ultrasonic cold mist
  • Multiple timer modes
  • Auto shut-off when dry
products.seo_description: A miniature hearth with a startlingly real flame and a soft scented mist — warmth without the heat.

products.title: Autivora Apollo — Rocket Flame Diffuser
products.body_html:
A desk rocket on a glowing plume of mist — a small piece of liftoff for the workspace.

  • Flame-glow LED base
  • Ultrasonic cold mist
  • Compact desk footprint
  • USB powered
products.seo_description: A desk rocket on a glowing plume of mist — a small piece of liftoff for the workspace.

products.title: Autivora Nova — Disco-Ball Light Diffuser
products.body_html:
A mirrored sphere that scatters a full laser light-show while it diffuses — the room's centerpiece.

  • Mirror-ball laser light show
  • Ultrasonic cold mist
  • Multiple light modes
  • USB powered
products.seo_description: A mirrored sphere that scatters a full laser light-show while it diffuses — the room's centerpiece.

products.title: Autivora Grove — Wood-Grain Diffuser
products.body_html:
A warm wood-grain column that disappears into any room and quietly keeps the air fresh.

  • Wood-grain finish
  • Ultrasonic cold mist
  • Soft ambient light
  • Auto shut-off when dry
products.seo_description: A warm wood-grain column that disappears into any room and quietly keeps the air fresh.

products.title: Autivora Express — Steam-Train Diffuser
products.body_html:
A locomotive that puffs scented smoke-rings from its stack — a collectible that actually works.

  • Smoke-ring mist from the stack
  • Ultrasonic cold mist
  • Collectible detailing
  • USB powered
products.seo_description: A locomotive that puffs scented smoke-rings from its stack — a collectible that actually works.

products.title: Autivora Reservoir — 4L Humidifying Diffuser
products.body_html:
A 4-litre reservoir for whole-room humidifying and scenting that runs for hours between fills.

  • 4L large-capacity tank
  • Adjustable mist output
  • Top-fill, easy to refill
  • Timer + sleep modes
products.seo_description: A 4-litre reservoir for whole-room humidifying and scenting that runs for hours between fills.

products.title: Autivora Atmos Wi-Fi — Commercial Scent Diffuser
products.body_html:
A wall-mounted, app-scheduled nebulizer that scents up to a mid-size commercial space — pure oil, no water.

  • Wi-Fi app scheduling
  • Waterless cold-air nebulizing
  • Covers mid-size commercial areas
  • Magnetic refill bay
products.seo_title: Autivora Atmos Wi-Fi | Commercial Diffuser | Autivora
products.seo_description: A wall-mounted, app-scheduled nebulizer that scents up to a mid-size commercial space — pure oil, no water.

products.title: Autivora Atmos Pro — HVAC Scent Machine
products.body_html:
The commercial workhorse: an HVAC-integrated scent machine for large venues, run by app with precise scheduling.

  • HVAC-integrated cold-air scenting
  • App scheduling + intensity control
  • Covers large commercial spaces
  • Waterless nebulizing — pure oil
products.seo_title: Autivora Atmos Pro | Commercial Diffuser | Autivora
products.seo_description: The commercial workhorse: an HVAC-integrated scent machine for large venues, run by app with precise scheduling.

products.title: Autivora Plug — Smart Wall Diffuser
products.body_html:
A wall-plug smart diffuser with app control — set-and-forget scenting for offices, lobbies and rooms.

  • Plugs straight into the wall
  • Smart-app (Wi-Fi) control
  • Scheduling + intensity levels
  • Magnetic refill design
products.seo_description: A wall-plug smart diffuser with app control — set-and-forget scenting for offices, lobbies and rooms.

products.title: Autivora Riff — Guitar Car Diffuser
products.body_html:
A miniature guitar that swings on a 360° clip — a design-led vent piece with a refillable scent core.

  • 360° rotating silicone vent clip
  • Sways with the airflow
  • Waterless refillable core
  • Universal vent fit
products.seo_description: A miniature guitar that swings on a 360° clip — a design-led vent piece with a refillable scent core.

products.title: Autivora Orchard — Pear Car Diffuser
products.body_html:
A no-spill pear that nestles in a vent and keeps a soft fruity scent in the cabin.

  • No-spill solid-scent design
  • Clips to any air vent
  • Refillable scent core
  • Compact, lightweight
products.seo_description: A no-spill pear that nestles in a vent and keeps a soft fruity scent in the cabin.
